---
title: "nicole_hierarchial"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(rstanarm)

cleaned_data <- read_csv("data/cleaned_data.csv")
glimpse(data)
```

```{r}
cleaned_data <- cleaned_data %>%
  mutate(
    Missed = Attempts - Completions
  ) %>%
  select(Player, year, Completions, Missed, Attempts, year)
```

```{r}
historical <- cleaned_data %>%
  filter(year < 2025)

data_2025 <- cleaned_data %>%
  filter(year == 2025)
```

```{r}
hist_model <- stan_glmer(
  cbind(Completions, Missed) ~ 1 + (1 | Player) + (1 | year),
  data = historical,
  family = binomial(link = "logit"),
  chains = 4,
  iter = 4000,
  seed = 123
)
```

```{r}
posterior <- as.data.frame(hist_model)
mu_mean <- mean(posterior$`(Intercept)`)
mu_sd   <- sd(posterior$`(Intercept)`)
```

```{r}
model_2025 <- stan_glmer(
  cbind(Completions, Missed) ~ 1 + (1 | Player),
  data = data_2025,
  family = binomial(link = "logit"),
  prior = normal(mu_mean, mu_sd),
  prior_aux = exponential(1),
  chains = 4,
  iter = 4000,
  seed = 123
)
```

```{r}
# Summary table for intercept and random effects
summary(model_2025)
```

```{r}
# Extract random effects as data frame
player_re <- ranef(model_2025)$Player

# Convert to tibble and include Player as a column
qb_effects <- player_re %>%
  as_tibble(rownames = "Player") %>%
  rename(Player_Effect = `(Intercept)`)

qb_effects

mu <- fixef(model_2025)[1]  # league-average logit

qb_effects <- qb_effects %>%
  mutate(
    Estimated_Accuracy = plogis(mu + Player_Effect)
  )

#qb_effects

qb_ranking <- qb_effects %>%
  arrange(desc(Estimated_Accuracy))

qb_ranking
```

```{r}
# Make sure the Player names match exactly between tables
qb_ranking_actual <- qb_ranking %>%
  left_join(
    X2025_data %>% 
      select(Player, CmpPct = `Cmp%`) %>%  # select Player and actual completion %
      mutate(Actual_Completion = CmpPct / 100),
    by = "Player"
  ) %>%
  select(Player, Estimated_Accuracy, Actual_Completion)  # keep only relevant columns

qb_ranking_actual
```

### Final pipeline

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(rstanarm)

cleaned_data <- read_csv("data/cleaned_data.csv")
glimpse(data)
```

```{r}
cleaned_data <- cleaned_data %>%
  mutate(
    Missed = Attempts - Completions
  ) %>%
  select(Player, year, Completions, Missed, Attempts, year)
```

```{r}
historical <- cleaned_data %>%
  filter(year < 2025)

data_2025 <- cleaned_data %>%
  filter(year == 2025)
```

```{r}
hist_model <- stan_glmer(
  cbind(Completions, Missed) ~ 1 + (1 | Player) + (1 | year),
  data = historical,
  family = binomial(link = "logit"),
  chains = 4,
  iter = 5000*2,
  seed = 123,
  refresh = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
posterior <- as.data.frame(hist_model)
mu_mean <- mean(posterior$`(Intercept)`)
mu_sd   <- sd(posterior$`(Intercept)`)
```

```{r}
model_2025 <- stan_glmer(
  cbind(Completions, Missed) ~ 1 + (1 | Player),
  data = data_2025,
  family = binomial(link = "logit"),
  prior = normal(mu_mean, mu_sd),
  prior_aux = exponential(1),
  chains = 4,
  iter = 5000*2,
  seed = 123, 
  refresh = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
library(bayesplot)

posterior_array <- as.array(model_2025)
```

```{r}
mcmc_trace(posterior_array, 
           pars = c("(Intercept)", "Sigma[Player:(Intercept),(Intercept)]"))
```

```{r}
mcmc_acf(posterior_array, 
         pars = c("(Intercept)", "Sigma[Player:(Intercept),(Intercept)]"))
```

```{r}
mcmc_dens_overlay(posterior_array, 
           pars = c("(Intercept)", "Sigma[Player:(Intercept),(Intercept)]"))
```

```{r}
library(bayesplot)
pp_check(model_2025, nreps = 100)
```

```{r}
post_preds <- posterior_epred(model_2025)

mu_preds <- colMeans(post_preds)

actual_rates <- data_2025$Completions / (data_2025$Completions + data_2025$Missed)

mae_2025 <- mean(abs(mu_preds - actual_rates))
mae_2025
```

```{r}
library(loo)

if (any(pareto_k_values(loo_2025) > 0.7)) {
  loo_2025 <- loo(model_2025, k_threshold = 0.7, cores = 2)
}
```
